titleStmt.title: SII 28.12: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 12. (A.R. No. 12 of 1913.) PERAMBALŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: The records the royal order which is in the form of approval of the action of the Ūravar as recorded in No. 11 above to facilitate the celebration of the festival ending with tittam on the day of Bharaṇi, the birth day asterism of Akkaṉ (apparently this word referred to the queen as mentioned in No. 11 above. Here it is stated that the major bloc of 10 vēli of land had remained waste upto the 16th year. The assignment of this bloc as also of the block of 2 vēli, as tirunandavana-ppuṟa-iṟai-ili as made by the nāṭṭār as recorded in No. 11 above was now approved by the king who further exempted these two blocs of land from taxes (tiru-viḍai-yāṭṭa-iṟai-ili) and all the cesses (āyam) such as tūta-vari, śi-kāriya-ppēṟṟu-kkaḍmai, paruchaṭṭa-kkāṇikkai from the year 18. The exemption as ordered seems to have implied an authority to the temple to collect these taxes from the blocs for its own use, as now, that royal order stipulated that with that capital, a sandhi worship and maintenance of the premises of the temple must also be carried out. The record was authenticated by Neṭṭūr-uḍaiyāṉ and Sundara-pāṇḍiya-Viḻupparaiyan in that order. That the above was a royal order is indicated by the word viditam (with my knowledge) at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal . vempār nāṭṭu mel kūṟṟu nāṭṭa
vaṟkup perumpālūril kopāla kūttarāṉa viṇ
ṇakar Emperumāṉukku Akkaṉ tirunāḷāṉa paraṇiyil tittamā
ka Eḻuntaruḷak kaṭṭiṉa tirunāḷukkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi yuḷḷiṭṭa
nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum Ivvūr teṉparappil patiṉāṟāvatu varaiyum A
ṉaittāṇṭum pāḻkiṭanta nilattil patiṉeṭṭāvatu mutal nāṭṭār
kuṭutta Olaippaṭi nilam patiṟṟuveliyum Innāyaṉāṟku tirunantava
ṉappuṟa Iṟaiyili nilam Iruveliyum Ākaṉilam paṉṉiru veliyum
Iṉṉāyaṉārukkuk kuṭuttom Iṉṉāḷ mutal tiruvi ṭaiyāṭṭa Iṟaiyi
liyāka Iṉṉilam paṉṉiruveliyum tūtavari cikāri yappeṟṟukkaṭa
mai paricaṭṭakkāṇikkai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyamuḷppaṭak kuṭu
ttom Innilam tiruttit tāṉ veṇṭum payiṟ ceytu Innāya
ṉāṟkuttiru kum cantikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka kkoḷḷa
vum Ippaṭikku Ivvolaiye piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu nāṉkellai
yilum tiruvāḻikkallum nāṭṭuvittu cantirātittavaṟ celvatā
ka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu viditam §
Digital edition of SII 28.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
